changelog: 🛠️ Software by voice — "I want to make a video, what should I install?" Jarvis researches, recommends, confirms, installs it from the Debian repos, and offers to open it. Or just say "install OBS Studio".
🔓 No login, no screen lock — the machine boots to a ready desktop and never locks you out (re-enable any time in Settings → Privacy).
⚡ First reply in seconds — the AI model is warmed into the GPU at boot instead of cold-loading on your first command.
🔎 "Open Google and search for X" now actually searches; web search defaults to DuckDuckGo (Google walls our voice browser behind CAPTCHAs — a locked door for hands-free users).
🔧 Self-update migrations now really run (a permissions bug had silently skipped them since v0.8) — updating to 1.2 applies the boot preload and no-lock defaults to your existing install too.
